---
name: Review objection or status-change proposal
about: Propose a bounded CHC criticism, correction, downgrade, or review-status change.
title: "[Review] "
labels: review
assignees: ""
---

## Claim family

Detector records / Classical objectivity / Interface branches / Public-data stress windows

## Target page or paper

Paper number, section, route, status label, or URL.

## Objection type

- Collapse into existing language
- Stronger baseline
- Selection-function / tuning leakage
- Missing lemma
- Missing reference
- Overclaim
- Reproducibility issue
- Broken link / documentation issue

## Proposed status change

No change / Narrow wording / Downgrade / Blocked on data / Retire label

## Evidence or reference

Minimal citation, dataset, derivation, counterexample, or reproduction note.

## What would resolve this

Correction, stronger theorem, narrower claim, failed gate, public artifact, or withdrawal of a label.
